summary: On March 7, 2026, Rubikon Center operators in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction conducted strikes on Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel and intercepted 88 fixed-wing UAVs, bringing their total FPV air defense interceptions to over 1,500 UAVs from more than 70 models, with 75% of fixed-wing UAVs belonging to 11 specific Ukrainian and Western-made drone types. Meanwhile, Lasar’s Group from Ukraine’s National Guard repelled mechanized assaults by enemy forces on the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions in late January, destroying enemy tanks with support from adjacent units. In a separate development, Iranian subsonic loitering air defense missiles, the Missile 358, equipped with thermal imaging homing heads, have proven effective against Israeli Hermes-900 UAVs in low-visibility conditions.
